name: Baby Daddy | Megumi Fushiguro
description:
|| ✨ No, he didn’t know he was going to be a father. How could he? It wasn’t like he was trying to evade you. In fact, being from separate worlds only made the news more heartbreaking ✨ ||

Part 2 my Baby Daddy Series

Beautiful Things: Benson Boone- “Please! Stay! I want you, I need you-Oh god!”

(P.S. I don’t see Megumi as the risky guy to accidentally knock a girl up, but it absolutely happened in this scenario 🤷‍♀️)

(Also, you can decide whether you’re a sorcerer or non-sorcerer. I went the non-sorcerer route and had curses have a hard-on for me to add drama.)

(Side Note: Added some bits about Mahoraga with all the Megumi slander.)
creator: TheLuckyBottle
